calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Order Confirming Successor Trustee, Confirming Trust Asset, And Disavowing Title Or Interest In A Nonasset
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sprague for (petitioner) Hermitanio Sotelo.

The Court stated that this is a petition to clean up issues with the trust property, confirmed that there are no objections and stated that the Dr.'s statement of incapacity is over a year old and asked if there was a newer one. Mr. Sprague provided an updated letter to the Court. The Court stated that it is inclined to void the documents that had incorrect language regarding 19, to confirm 21 as property of the trust, but will not appoint an elisor. The Court granted the petition for order confirming successor trustee, confirming trust asset, and disavowing title or interest in a non-asset(subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)
